commands.focused_tests: uv run pytest -q tests/test_judge_restricted.py tests/test_judge_inspect.py tests/test_judge_replay.py tests/test_judge_documentation.py

scenarios.evidence: uv --offline --frozen executed the locked Replay worker
restricted environment test passed with invalid proxy/socket/game paths and no API key
Replay passed with GAME_PROJECT_PATH pointing to a missing directory
injected failures returned artifact_missing, artifact_integrity_failed, or claim_value_mismatch
Python below 3.9 returned non-zero unsupported/python_unsupported JSON
timeout killed the worker and its descendant process group
SIGTERM returned replay_interrupted and killed the worker group
missing uv returned dependency_missing without fallback success
Inspect and Replay passed with no OPENAI_API_KEY
Docker executable unavailable on this host
scenarios.remediation: Run the same two canonical commands in the pinned Linux amd64 CI image before G4

decision: Repository-only Inspect/Replay and all local failure injections passed. Docker-based Linux amd64 approximation remains explicitly unverified and cannot support a platform claim yet.
